title: Get help after you return from the UK
body: "About the service  The Home Office offers help after you return to your home country if:   you have no legal right to remain in the UK you either choose to return home (voluntary return) or are being returned   We can help you when you arrive and for up to 12 months after you return.  You can still use the reintegration service if you have already received help from the Voluntary Returns Service (VRS) or the Facilitated Returns Scheme (FRS).  How we can help you  When you arrive in your home country  We can help you with:    someone to meet you at the airport (available upon request)   accommodation for up to 5 nights   transport to an address in the same country   care and food packs   small cash payment for items you may need    Living in your home country  We can help you with:    obtaining documentation   finding and rejoining with your family   local services, including health services   mental health support    We can also support you with accessing an education and entrepreneurship fund to help with:   finding a job further education or vocational training setting up a business  "
